title: nephrodium rhizophyllum
intro: Nephrodium rhizophyllum, also known as the forked fern or forked polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium rhizophyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
